name: netbox-docker-image-upgrade
description: App to deploy new image to all containers
author: vincent@saashup.com

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.dev-admin: APP_OWNER_EMAIL=contact@saashup.com OPERATION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=60 REGISTRY_WEBHOOK_SECRET=secret ENABLE_EDITOR=1 ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS=admin@local.test LOCAL_DEV_EMAIL=admin@local.test OIDC_ENABLED=false node server.js
scripts.dev-user: APP_OWNER_EMAIL=contact@saashup.com OPERATION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=60 REGISTRY_WEBHOOK_SECRET=secret ENABLE_EDITOR=1 ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS=admin@local.test LOCAL_DEV_EMAIL=demo@local.test OIDC_ENABLED=false node server.js
scripts.integration:up:
sudo chmod 777 /var/run/docker.sock && sudo --preserve-env=DOCKER_SOCK_GID docker compose -f tests/integration/docker-compose.yml up -d --build && AGENT_URL=$(sudo docker compose -f tests/integration/docker-compose.yml port agent 1880 | sed 's/^0\.0\.0\.0:/localhost:/; s/^\[::\]:/localhost:/') && PAASBOX_URL=$(sudo docker compose -f tests/integration/docker-compose.yml port paasbox 8000 | sed 's/^0\.0\.0\.0:/localhost:/; s/^\[::\]:/localhost:/') && APP_URL=$(sudo docker compose -f tests/integration/docker-compose.yml port app 1880 | sed 's/^0\.0\.0\.0:/localhost:/; s/^\[::\]:/localhost:/') && printf "
Integration services are up:
  agent:   http://%s
  paasbox: http://%s
  app:     http://%s

" "$AGENT_URL" "$PAASBOX_URL" "$APP_URL"
scripts.integration:down: sudo docker compose -f tests/integration/docker-compose.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans && sudo docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' && sudo docker image rm saashup/curioo-tiles:v2.7.1 || true
scripts.integration:full: npm run integration:down && npm run integration:up && sleep 5 && npm run test:integration
